description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, including 2.7, pypy2, 3.5, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and pypy3. For each version, start backend services with docker-compose, cache dependencies, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements/ci.txt, run tests with pytest and report coverage, upload coverage to Codecov, and check that coverage is at least 100.
